texto: This view of literature as an aesthetic object that could make us ‘better people’ is linked to a certain idea of the subject, to what theorists have come to call ‘the liberal subject’, the individual defined not by a social situation and interests but by an individual subjectivity (rationality and morality) conceived as essentially free of social determinants.
explicacao: Citação de Jonathan Culler sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “This view of literature as an aesthetic object that could make us ‘better people’ is linked to a …” articula reflexao, literature, subject em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
